query:
SELECT 
  fr.code, fr.name, fr.unitWeight, fr.yieldPercentage,
  frc.quantity, frc.componentType,
  i.name as ingredient_name, i.unitType as ing_unit,
  fr2.name as recipe_name, fr2.code as recipe_code
FROM final_recipes fr
LEFT JOIN final_recipe_components frc ON fr.id = frc.recipeFinalId
LEFT JOIN ingredients i ON frc.componentId = i.id AND frc.componentType = 'INGREDIENT'
LEFT JOIN final_recipes fr2 ON frc.componentId = fr2.id AND frc.componentType = 'SEMI_FINISHED'
WHERE fr.code = 'CARNE_RIBS'
ORDER BY frc.quantity DESC;
